title: Villager/ Wandering trader drops
description: Villlager and wandering traders now drop items
body:
This datapack makes both villagers and wandering traders drop loot, giving a point to kill them and loot random villager...
They usually drop emeralds, but ccan also drop other loot
<details>
<summary>Villager drops</summary>
1-5 Emeralds 100%
  
Emerald block 20%                       
Book 50%                
Bottle o enchanting 20%                
Bell 10%                
</details>


<details>
<summary>Wandering trader</summary>
2-10 Emeralds 100%

1-2 Emerald block 100%     
2 Lead 100%        
1 Nautilus Shell 100%      
</details>

If the minecraft says the mod is made for a older/newer version, check if you downloaded the correct one and if it is, its fine. Sometimes, the file names are not updated.
